processing_status: preview-ready; no extinction or host correction
caveat: Observed AB magnitudes are not corrected for Milky Way extinction, host extinction, or host-galaxy light.
Source table uses Swift/BAT time; CSV also gives Fermi/GBM-converted times by adding 3199 s.
Energy flux is kept in the paper's 100 MeV-100 GeV band and photon-index convention.
Prompt Epeak is kept in observer frame; no rest-frame, bolometric, or energetics conversion.
